burden.dalyPerCapita: high in severe disease; major impact on heart failure

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Echocardiography with valve area and gradient assessment; symptoms of exertional dyspnea, angina, or syncope

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Low to moderate; access to valve replacement is variable

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Echocardiography access concentrated in referral centers
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Surgical aortic valve replacement (SAVR); TAVR limited in SUS
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Long wait times for surgery and limited TAVR availability
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: SBC guidelines and expanding cardiac surgery capacity
